use_cases: Displaying real-time system alerts and status messages to users
Showing earnings or financial notifications with summary details
Delivering personalized notifications from AI assistants or doctors
Presenting timeline-based event notifications with animated entry
Serving as in-app notification badges for healthcare or SaaS applications
ai_summary: A notification card component that displays alert messages with animated entrance effects using framer-motion. Features a clean flat design with a green accent color, avatar display, and configurable props for AI names, user information, earnings, and medical context. Includes timeline-style visual indicators and smooth spring-based animations for a polished user feedback experience.
